Modern, University Drama

⋆˖⁺‧₊☽𓃠☾₊‧⁺˖⋆

Any User! × Former Bully + Ex Bestie Char!

⋆˖⁺‧₊

Behind every cocky grin is a secret he swears no one’s allowed to see. Tonight? It’s messy blonde hair, thick rimmed glasses, and a late night gaming spiral powered by four empty cans of Monster and one very repressed guilty conscience. Jayson Brooke, Langford's chaotic jock king and serial heartbreaker is just trying to forget. Forget the regret. Forget that freak. Too bad fate delivers more than pizza.

⋆˖⁺‧₊☽

When an unexpected hallway run in catches him off guard, in full gremlin gamer mode no less. Jay’s facade shatters for a split second. No jock armor, no frat swagger. Just the boy he used to be, exposed… and seen. Will he hide behind venomous words again? Or is the truth already slipping out between smirks and shoulder bumps?
